#### `{r} sR$headings$antimicrobial_susceptibility_testing`

```{r}
#| output: asis
.show(params$includeMethodsTexts)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_methods-resistance-test.Rmd")
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
.end()
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-resistance-test-rate
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

tbl_data <- reference_data |>
    neoipcr::get_resistance_test_rate_table()

tbl <- tbl_data |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      i = dplyr::if_else(.data$cond == "routine", 0, 2),
      abr = ordered(
        paste0(c(.data$abr, .data$cond), collapse = "_"),
        levels = c("3gcr_routine", "car_routine", "car_if_3gcr", "cor_routine",
                   "cor_if_3gcr&car", "mrsa_routine", "vre_routine")),
      ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data$abr) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      abr = dplyr::recode_values(
        .data$abr,
        "3gcr_routine" ~ sR$`3gcr`,
        "car_routine" ~ sR$car,
        "car_if_3gcr" ~ paste0(
          "\\- ",
          sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$car_if_3gcr,
          collapse = ""),
        "cor_routine" ~ sR$cor,
        "cor_if_3gcr&car" ~ paste0(
          "\\- ",
          sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$cor_if_3gcr_and_car,
          collapse = ""),
        "mrsa_routine" ~ sR$mrsa,
        "vre_routine" ~ sR$vre),
      .before = 1) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    !!sR$table_headers$n := "n",
    !!sR$table_headers$pooled := "pooled",
    !!sR$table_headers$q1 := "q1",
    !!sR$table_headers$q2 := "q2",
    !!sR$table_headers$q3 := "q3")

cw <- compute_col_widths(tbl_data, stub_min = 30)

# Opt back in to the default CI pattern: earlier sibling tables mutate the
# shared `ci_pattern` to inline, which would otherwise overflow this table's
# narrow rate columns when both pooled and quartile CIs are shown.
ci_pattern <- ci_pattern_default

gt_tbl <- tbl |>
  gt(rowname_col = "abr") |>
  sub_missing() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    latex.header_repeat = TRUE,
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = cw$font_size,
    footnotes.marks = "extended"
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = !sR$table_headers$n,
    decimals = 1,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2,
    locale = locale_gt) |>
  fmt_integer(
    columns = sR$table_headers$n,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
  fmt_markdown(columns = "abr")

# Pooled rate CI merge
if (include_pooled_ci && "ci_lower" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    cols_merge(
      columns = c(sR$table_headers$pooled, "ci_lower", "ci_upper"),
      pattern = ci_pattern,
      rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled))
} else if ("ci_lower" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = c("ci_lower", "ci_upper"))
}

# Quartile bootstrap CI merge
if ("q1_ci_lower" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
  if (include_quartile_ci) {
    has_boot <- !is.na(gt_tbl$`_data`[["q1_ci_lower"]])
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = has_boot) |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = has_boot) |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper"),
        pattern = ci_pattern,
        rows = has_boot)
  } else {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
      "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper",
      "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper",
      "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper")))
  }
}

gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
  cols_width(
    stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
    sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
    sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(cw$pooled),
    sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(cw$q),
    sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(cw$q),
    sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(cw$q))

gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
  tab_stub_indent(
    rows = gt::everything(),
    indent = gt::from_column(column = "i")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(
      style = "italic"
      ),
    locations = cells_stub(
      rows = cond %in% c("if_3gcr","if_3gcr&car")
    )
  ) |>
  cols_hide(columns = c("i","cond")) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`rate_name`,
    columns = tidyselect::any_of(
     c(
     sR$table_headers$pooled,
     sR$table_headers$q1,
     sR$table_headers$q2,
     sR$table_headers$q3)),
    id = "antibiotic_resistance_test_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels(),
      cells_row_groups()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`rate_name`,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`rate_numerator`,
        "}}{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$`rate_denominator`,
        "}} \\times ",
        format_integer(100),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "antibiotic_resistance_test_rate"),
    placement = "right"
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$n_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$n),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n),
    placement = "right") |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-resistance-test-rate`$pooled_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$pooled),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled),
    placement = "right")

# Sparse-data footnote for N < sparse_threshold
if (any(!is.na(tbl_data$pooled) & tbl_data$n < sparse_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  fn_text <- if (include_pooled_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
  fn_text <- glue::glue(fn_text, threshold = sparse_threshold)
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    gt::tab_footnote(
      footnote = fn_text,
      locations = cells_body(
        columns = sR$table_headers$n,
        rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled) & tbl_data$n < sparse_threshold),
      placement = "right")
}

gt_tbl
```
